tools.name: accessToken.accessTokenPut
tools.description: Creates a Access Token to write on a Card (e.g. NFC)

tools.name: account.accountLogin
tools.description: GET /api/Account/login

tools.name: account.postApiAccountLogin
tools.description: POST /api/Account/login

tools.name: actions.actionsGet
tools.description: Gets all available Actions of a Device

tools.name: actions.actionsPost
tools.description: Set an action for the specified device.

tools.name: additionalDeviceInformation.additionalDeviceInformationGet
tools.description: Gets the additional information (e.g. Firmware Version) about a device.

tools.name: customDevice.customDeviceGet
tools.description: Gets all Devices

tools.name: customDevice.customDevicePost
tools.description:
Creates or updates a Custom Device or updates it's values.
            A Custom Device can be any device that like to add some measurement values to the smart-me Cloud.
            Only use a custom device for all non meters.
            For a new device leave the ID empty. To create a device you have to set the DeviceEnergyType.
            To update values, add the ID of the device and the values you like to set.  (See the Data Type Model for more Information)

tools.name: customDevice.getApiCustomDeviceId
tools.description: Gets a Device by it's ID

tools.name: deviceBySerial.deviceBySerialGet
tools.description: Gets a Device by it's Serial Number. The Serial is the part before the "-".

tools.name: devices.devicesGet
tools.description: Gets all Devices

tools.name: devices.devicesPost
tools.description:
Creates or updates a Device or updates it's values. 
            For a new device leave the ID empty. To create a device you have to set the DeviceEnergyType.
            To update values, add the ID of the device and the values you like to set.  (See the Data Type Model for more Information)

tools.name: devices.devicesPut
tools.description:
Updates the On/Off Switch on a device
            For new implementations please use the "actions" command

tools.name: devices.getApiDevicesId
tools.description: Gets a Device by it's ID

tools.name: devicesByEnergy.devicesByEnergyGet
tools.description: Gets all Devices for an Energy Type

tools.name: devicesBySubType.devicesBySubTypeGet
tools.description: Gets all Devices by it's Sub Type (e.g. E-Charging Station)

tools.name: fastSendDeviceValues.fastSendDeviceValuesGet
tools.description:
Force a device to send the data every second (if supported). This for about 30s.
            Don't use this call to force a device to send the data every second for a longer time.

tools.name: folder.folderGet
tools.description: Gets the Values for a folder or a meter

tools.name: folderAssign.folderAssignPost
tools.description: Assign a folder (source) or meter to another folder (target). Can be used to create a folder structure.

tools.name: folderMenu.folderMenuGet
tools.description: Gets the folder menu items (each item might contain child items)

tools.name: folderMenu.folderMenuPost
tools.description: Creates and updates the folder menu items

tools.name: folderSettings.folderSettingsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a folder

tools.name: folderSettings.folderSettingsGet
tools.description: Gets the settings of a folder or meter

tools.name: folderSettings.folderSettingsPost
tools.description: Add or edit a folder or a meter. To add a new folder use and empty ID

tools.name: health.healthGet
tools.description:
A method returning HTTP 200 OK when queried.
            It is used by Kubernetes probes to determine whether the app is healthy.

tools.name: mBus.mBusPost
tools.description:
M-BUS API: Adds data of a M-BUS Meter to the smart-me Cloud.
            Just send us the M-BUS Telegram (RSP_UD) and we will do the Rest.

tools.name: meterFolderInformation.meterFolderInformationGet
tools.description: Beta: Gets the General Information for a Meter or a Folder

tools.name: meterFolderInformation.meterFolderInformationPost
tools.description: Sets the Name of a Meter or a Folder

tools.name: meterValues.meterValuesGet
tools.description: Gets the Values for a Meter at a given Date. The first Value found before the given Date is returned.

tools.name: oAuth.oAuthAuthorize
tools.description: GET /api/oauth/authorize

tools.name: oAuth.postApiOauthAuthorize
tools.description: POST /api/oauth/authorize

tools.name: pico.picoGet
tools.description: Gets all pico charging stations for this user

tools.name: picoCharging.picoChargingGet
tools.description: Gets the active charging data of a pico station

tools.name: picoChargingHistory.picoChargingHistoryGet
tools.description: Gets the last charging history for a pico station

tools.name: picoEnableFixCableLock.picoEnableFixCableLockPost
tools.description: Try to fix lock the cable of a pico. The pico must be online and a cable (without car) needs to be connected. Otherwise this will fail.

tools.name: picoLoadmanagementGroup.getApiPicoLoadmanagementgroup
tools.description:
GET: api/pico/loadmanagementgroup
            
            Returns all available load management groups

tools.name: picoLoadmanagementGroup.picoLoadmanagementGroupGet
tools.description:
GET: api/pico/loadmanagementgroup
            
            Returns a pico load management group by it's id

tools.name: picoLoadmanagementSetDynamicCurrent.picoLoadmanagementSetDynamicCurrentPost
tools.description: Sets the dynamic current of a load management group or a single station.

tools.name: picoSettings.picoSettingsGet
tools.description:
GET: api/pico/settings
            
            Returns the settings of a pico charging station.

tools.name: registerForRealtimeApi.registerForRealtimeApiDelete
tools.description: Deletes a realtime API registration.

tools.name: registerForRealtimeApi.registerForRealtimeApiGet
tools.description: Gets all registrations for the Realtime API.

tools.name: registerForRealtimeApi.registerForRealtimeApiPost
tools.description: Creates a new registration for the realtime API. The Realtime API sends you the data of the registred devices as soon as we have them on the cloud. More Information about the realtime API: https://www.smart-me.com/Description/api/realtimeapi.aspx

tools.name: smartMeDeviceConfiguration.smartMeDeviceConfigurationGet
tools.description: Gets the configuration of a smart-me device.

tools.name: smartMeDeviceConfiguration.smartMeDeviceConfigurationPost
tools.description: Sets the configuration of a smart-me device. The device needs to be online.

tools.name: subUser.subUserDelete
tools.description: Delete a subuser

tools.name: subUser.subUserGet
tools.description: Get a sub user. The user must be assigend to the user that makes this call.

tools.name: subUser.subUserPost
tools.description:
Creates or updates a subuser.
            To create a new user set no ID (empty)

tools.name: user.userDelete
tools.description: Triggers user account deletion.

tools.name: user.userGet
tools.description: Gets the informations for the user.

tools.name: userToFolderAssign.userToFolderAssignDelete
tools.description: Deletes a user to folder assignement

tools.name: userToFolderAssign.userToFolderAssignPost
tools.description: Assign a user to a folder

tools.name: values.valuesGet
tools.description: Gets all (last) values of a device

tools.name: valuesInPast.valuesInPastGet
tools.description: Gets the Values for a device at a given Date. The first Value found before the given Date is returned.

tools.name: valuesInPastMultiple.valuesInPastMultipleGet
tools.description: Gets multiple values of a device. This call needs a smart-me professional licence.

tools.name: virtualBillingMeterActive.virtualBillingMeterActiveGet
tools.description: Beta: Gets all active virtual meters.

tools.name: virtualBillingMeterActive.virtualBillingMeterActivePost
tools.description: Beta: Virtual Meter API: Activates a Meter and add the Consumption to a Virtual Meter assosiated with the User.

tools.name: virtualBillingMeterDeactivate.virtualBillingMeterDeactivatePost
tools.description: Beta: Virtual Meter API: Deactivates a Virtual Meter.

tools.name: virtualBillingMeters.virtualBillingMetersGet
tools.description: Beta: Gets all Meters available to activate as a Virtual Meter.

tools.name: virtualMeterCalculateFormula.virtualMeterCalculateFormulaGet
virtualTariff.getApiVirtualTariffId
tools.description: Gets all virtual tariffs of a folder

tools.name: virtualTariff.virtualTariffGet
tools.description: Gets all Virtual Tariffs of a user

tools.name: virtualTariffConsumption.virtualTariffConsumptionGet
tools.description: Gets the consumption of a folder with a virtuall tariffs.

tools.name: virtualTariffsForProperty.virtualTariffsForPropertyGet
tools.description: Gets all Virtual Tariffs for a property (folder)

tools.name: virtualTariffsStatusForProperty.virtualTariffsStatusForPropertyGet
tools.description: Gets the calculation status for a virtual tariff property

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
